home.heroTitle: Where Ancient Vedic Wisdom Meets Sacred Service
home.heroSubtitle: A 501(c)(3) sanctuary of Shraddha, Saburi & Samidha — offering Agnihotra, Maha Yagnas, Sadhana Retreats, and Gaushala Seva on 400+ sacred acres in Arlington, Tennessee.

🐄 Gaushala Seva weekend visits · Saturday 8AM–5PM, Sunday 8AM–4PM

🌿 Panchagavya products now available · Contact us to order

about.missionStatement: To preserve, practice, and propagate ancient Vedic knowledge through Agnihotra, Yagna, Gaushala Seva, and Sadhana — creating a living bridge between timeless spiritual wisdom and contemporary life.
about.foundingStory: S3 Foundation was established in 2005 by Sri Purushottamji, a revered Vedic scholar and practitioner who envisioned a space where authentic Vedic traditions could flourish in the Americas. Starting with just a small group of seekers in Arlington, Tennessee, the foundation has grown into a 400-acre sanctuary serving thousands of devotees each year.
about.founderBio: A revered Vedic scholar and practitioner with over three decades of experience in Agnihotra, Yagna Vidhi, Vedic Sciences, and Gaushala management. Under his guidance, S3 Foundation has become the foremost Vedic center in the Americas.

timeline.event: S3 Foundation established by Sri Purushottamji with a small group of seekers in Arlington, TN
First Maha Yagnam conducted — over 500 devotees attend from across North America
400+ acres of sacred farmland acquired — foundation for the ashram campus
Gaushala established — first Gir cows from Gujarat arrive at the ashram
Grand 30,000 sq.ft Yagna Shala inaugurated — largest Vedic ritual space in the Americas
First Laksha Chandi Maha Yagnam — unprecedented 100,000 Chandi recitations
Shiva Shakti Maha Yagnam and Gandabherunda Lakshmi Narasimha Homa conducted
Ongoing: Vedic Temple, Gurukul, and Vedic University Campus development

programs.title: Agnihotra
programs.subtitle: Daily Fire Ritual
programs.description: The ancient Vedic fire ritual performed precisely at sunrise and sunset using cow dung cakes, ghee, and raw rice. Open to all visitors, this daily practice purifies the atmosphere, promotes healing, and connects practitioners with cosmic rhythms. No prior experience needed.

programs.title: Laksha Chandi Maha Yagnam
programs.subtitle: Annual Grand Yagna
programs.description: The jewel of S3 Foundation's annual calendar — a 10-day Maha Yagnam during Navaratri featuring 100,000 recitations of the Chandi Stotra by hundreds of Vedic priests. This unprecedented event in the Americas draws thousands of devotees each year. Free for all sincere seekers.

programs.title: Sadhana Retreats
programs.subtitle: Spiritual Immersion
programs.description: Multi-day residential retreats combining Agnihotra, meditation, yoga, Vedic chanting, and Satsang with experienced guides. Participants live the ashram schedule, eat sattvic meals, and undergo genuine spiritual transformation in a serene natural setting.

programs.title: Satsang & Discourses
programs.subtitle: Sacred Gathering
programs.description: Weekly and festival Satsangs featuring Vedic chanting, spiritual discourse, and communal prasad. Topics span Vedantic philosophy, Bhagavad Gita, Upanishads, and practical spiritual wisdom for modern life. Open to all every Sunday.

programs.title: Youth & Horse Riding
programs.subtitle: Next Generation
programs.description: Programs for children and teens to experience Vedic values through nature, horses, organic farming, yoga, and cultural arts. Instilling dharmic values through experiential learning and ashram life.

programs.title: Panchagavya Farming
programs.subtitle: Sacred Agriculture
programs.description: Organic farming using traditional Panchagavya formulations derived from the sacred Gir cow. Learn biodynamic and Vedic farming techniques while contributing to the ashram's self-sufficiency and the global movement for natural agriculture.

gaushala.intro: Our Gaushala is home to over 200 sacred Gir cows on 400+ acres of lush Tennessee farmland. Each cow is treated with the reverence she deserves — named, cared for individually, and never separated from her calf.

products.name: A2 Milk

products.name: Cow Dung Products

events.title: Laksha Chandi Maha Yagnam 2025
events.description: 10-day Navaratri Maha Yagnam with 100,000 Chandi recitations. FREE for all sincere seekers. Registration open.

events.title: Guru Purnima Celebration
events.description: Sacred celebration honoring the Guru lineage with Pada Puja, Satsang, and Maha Prasad. Open to all.

events.title: Janmashtami Mahotsav
events.description: All-night celebration of Lord Krishna's birth with Abhishekam, bhajans, and midnight aarti.

events.title: Diwali Maha Aarti
events.description: Festival of lights with 1,000-lamp Maha Aarti, fireworks, cultural performances, and grand prasad.

events.title: Laksha Chandi Maha Yagnam 2023
events.description: Second annual Laksha Chandi — 50,000+ devotees, 500+ Vedic priests, 10 sacred days.

events.title: Shiva Shakti Maha Yagnam 2023
events.description: Rare combined Shiva-Shakti Maha Yagnam invoking divine feminine and masculine energies.
